overall.description: Cinematic aerial view of a futuristic cyberpunk metropolis at dusk, featuring towering neon-lit skyscrapers, an elevated highway, and a central plaza with steam vents. The game engine footage showcases dense urban architecture with atmospheric rain and haze effects.

white steam rising from ventilation shafts in the central plaza structure

segments.scene_description: Opening view of a cyberpunk city center at dusk, dominated by a circular plaza with steam vents and a massive holographic billboard overhead. The camera slowly pans right, revealing dense neon-lit skyscrapers and an elevated transit track, with rain droplets visible on the lens.

segments.scene_description: As the camera continues panning right, the central plaza shifts toward the left of the frame while the right-side buildings become more prominent. The holographic billboard cycles through advertisements, and the warm dusk lighting reflects off the wet surfaces below.

segments.scene_description: The camera's slow pan reveals a concrete building edge entering from the right, confirming an elevated vantage point on a structure. The central plaza and elevated track now appear on the left side of the frame, while the dense urban core continues to dominate the view with persistent rain and neon glow.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous rightward pan across a rain-slicked cyberpunk city center that shifts from a wide view of a central plaza to a focused perspective from an elevated vantage point. It begins centered on a circular plaza characterized by rising steam vents and a massive holographic billboard overhead, with rain droplets blurring the lens. As the camera glides right, the plaza recedes toward the left of the frame while the towering neon-lit skyscrapers and an elevated transit track become more prominent against the warm dusk light. The scene then shifts further to reveal the concrete edge of a building entering from the right, confirming the camera's position atop a structure. Finally, the view settles on the dense urban core, where the persistent rain and neon glow dominate the horizon as the plaza and tracks linger in the periphery.
